psalm-102-1.verse:
Hear my prayer, O Lord!
  And let my cry for help come to You.
psalm-102-1.prayer: Lord, hear my prayer and let my cry for help come before You. Thank You that I can bring every burden into Your presence.

psalm-102-2.prayer: Father, do not hide Your face from me in times of trouble. Incline Your ear to me and answer according to Your mercy.

psalm-102-3.verse:
For my days have been consumed in smoke,
  And my bones have been scorched like a hearth.
psalm-102-3.prayer: Lord, when my strength feels consumed and my heart is weary, sustain me with Your grace and compassion.

psalm-102-4.verse:
My heart has been smitten like grass and has withered away,
  Indeed, I forget to eat my bread.
psalm-102-4.prayer: Father, when sorrow overwhelms me, remind me that You are my source of life, hope, and restoration.

psalm-102-5.verse:
Because of the loudness of my groaning
  My bones cling to my flesh.
psalm-102-5.prayer: Lord, You see every tear and every struggle. Strengthen me when suffering leaves me exhausted.

psalm-102-6.verse:
I resemble a pelican of the wilderness;
  I have become like an owl of the waste places.
psalm-102-6.prayer: Father, when I feel isolated or alone, remind me that Your presence never leaves me.

psalm-102-7.verse:
I lie awake,
  I have become like a lonely bird on a housetop.
psalm-102-7.prayer: Lord, when sleeplessness and worry fill my mind, help me rest securely in Your care.

psalm-102-8.verse:
My enemies have reproached me all day long;
  Those who deride me have used my name as a curse.
psalm-102-8.prayer: Father, when criticism or opposition comes against me, keep my heart anchored in Your truth.

psalm-102-9.verse:
For I have eaten ashes like bread
  And mingled my drink with weeping
psalm-102-9.prayer: Lord, when grief becomes my daily companion, comfort me with Your lovingkindness and peace.

psalm-102-10.verse:
Because of Your indignation and Your wrath,
  For You have lifted me up and cast me away.
psalm-102-10.prayer: Father, even when I do not understand Your ways, help me trust Your wisdom and remain faithful.

psalm-102-11.verse:
My days are like a lengthened shadow,
  And I wither away like grass.
psalm-102-11.prayer: Lord, remind me that earthly life is temporary, but Your promises endure forever.

psalm-102-12.verse:
But You, O Lord, abide forever,
  And Your name to all generations.
psalm-102-12.prayer: Father, You remain forever. Help me build my hope upon Your unchanging character.

psalm-102-13.prayer: Lord, arise with compassion and mercy. Let Your favor and restoration come in Your perfect time.

psalm-102-14.verse:
Surely Your servants find pleasure in her stones
  And feel pity for her dust.
psalm-102-14.prayer: Father, help me love what You love and care about the things that matter to Your heart.

psalm-102-15.verse:
So the nations will fear the name of the Lord
  And all the kings of the earth Your glory.
psalm-102-15.prayer: Lord, let all people honor and revere Your name. May my life point others toward Your greatness.

psalm-102-16.verse:
For the Lord has built up Zion;
  He has appeared in His glory.
psalm-102-16.prayer: Father, thank You for building up and restoring what is broken. Let Your glory be revealed through restoration.

psalm-102-17.verse:
He has regarded the prayer of the destitute
  And has not despised their prayer.
psalm-102-17.prayer: Lord, hear the prayers of the needy and never despise those who call upon You.

psalm-102-18.verse:
This will be written for the generation to come,
  That a people yet to be created may praise the Lord.
psalm-102-18.prayer: Father, let future generations know of Your faithfulness through the testimony of my life.

psalm-102-19.verse:
For He looked down from His holy height;
  From heaven the Lord gazed upon the earth,
psalm-102-19.prayer: Lord, thank You for looking down with compassion and seeing every need from heaven.

psalm-102-20.verse:
To hear the groaning of the prisoner,
  To set free those who were doomed to death,
psalm-102-20.prayer: Father, bring freedom, hope, and deliverance to those who feel trapped or oppressed.

psalm-102-21.verse:
That men may tell of the name of the Lord in Zion
  And His praise in Jerusalem,
psalm-102-21.prayer: Lord, let Your name be declared and praised wherever Your people gather.

psalm-102-22.verse:
When the peoples are gathered together,
  And the kingdoms, to serve the Lord.
psalm-102-22.prayer: Father, unite people in worship and help all nations recognize Your greatness.

psalm-102-23.verse:
He has weakened my strength in the way;
  He has shortened my days.
psalm-102-23.prayer: Lord, when my strength fades, remind me that Your strength never fails.

psalm-102-24.verse:
I say, “O my God, do not take me away in the midst of my days,
  Your years are throughout all generations.
psalm-102-24.prayer: Father, teach me to trust Your eternal perspective even when my days feel short and uncertain.

psalm-102-25.verse:
Of old You founded the earth,
  And the heavens are the work of Your hands.
psalm-102-25.prayer: Lord, thank You for creating the earth and heavens through Your mighty power.

psalm-102-26.prayer: Father, though creation changes, You remain the same. Help me place my confidence in Your permanence.

psalm-102-27.verse:
But You are the same,
  And Your years will not come to an end.
psalm-102-27.prayer: Lord, You are unchanging and eternal. Let my heart rest securely in Your faithfulness.

psalm-102-28.verse:
The children of Your servants will continue,
  And their descendants will be established before You.”
psalm-102-28.prayer: Father, thank You that Your promises endure through every generation. Keep me steadfast in hope.

psalm-102-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for hearing my prayers, sustaining me in weakness, and remaining faithful through every generation. When I feel overwhelmed, lonely, weary, or uncertain, help me remember that You are eternal, unchanging, and full of compassion. Strengthen my heart, renew my hope, and let my life testify to Your faithfulness. May I trust You completely and find peace in Your everlasting love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
